headline: Add These 4 GARP Stocks to Your Portfolio to Receive Handsome Returns
summary: The GARP strategy helps investors gain exposure to stocks that have solid prospects and are trading at a discount. TPR, VRT, CLS and COR are some such stocks.

headline: Cencora Launches Next-Generation Nucleus® Solution with Multi-Site Pilot Across Specialty Physician Practices
summary: CONSHOHOCKEN, Pa., June 17, 2026--Cencora, a global pharmaceutical solutions company, today announced a multi-site pilot of its enhanced Nucleus® inventory management solution, designed to help specialty physician practices manage increasingly complex medication workflows with greater efficiency, visibility and control.
